defect: open stud bays at floor transitions
prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: You are on a commercial construction project governed by building codes, submittals, and third-party inspections. title: Compliance check: Fireblocking & draftstopping (commercial project)
